headline: France Hit By 70% Of Crypto Wrench Attacks

article.title: 70% of all crypto wrench attacks happen in France: Report
article.summary: Centralized data collection is a honeypot for hackers and organized criminals looking to target crypto holders and their families, according to Bitcoiners.

article.title: Analysts forecast a Bitcoin crash to the $60K level, revisiting 2026 low
article.summary: The price of Bitcoin is about $75,800 at the time of publication, a nearly 40% decrease from the all-time high of about $126,000 reached in October 2025.

headline: China Coal Blast Sparks $10B Energy Crisis Fears

article.title: China Coal Mine Blast Tests Limits of Xi’s Energy Security Push
article.summary: China’s world-beating coal production has helped shield its economy from the worst of the Iran war shock. Now the deadliest mining disaster in years is raising uncomfortable questions about the cost of that drive.

headline: LNG Tanker Sails to India Amid $100bn Trade Shift

article.title: LNG Tanker Exits Hormuz for India for First Time Since War Began
article.summary: A liquefied natural gas tanker carrying a shipment for India has exited the Strait of Hormuz, the first for the country from the Persian Gulf since the Iran war began months ago as the region’s exporters discreetly supply key buyers.

article.summary:

headline: ECB Warns EU: Stablecoin Rule Easing Risks Bank Losses

article.title: ECB warns EU finance ministers that easing euro stablecoin rules would weaken banks: Reuters
article.summary: ECB President Christine Lagarde warned the changes would destabilize bank funding and weaken interest-rate transmission.

headline: FTX Firms Pay $66M in Crypto Fraud Settlement

article.title: FTX’s former law firm, auditor agree to pay $66 million to settle customer claims over fraud
article.summary: The law firm, Fenwick & West, denied wrongdoing and still faces a separate $525 million suit in Washington that is not covered by Friday's deal.

headline: Iran Sanctions Risk Spikes on $10m Equipment Deal
